In our illustration. the: native had the balance of Jupiter Oasa of 8
years 9 months at the time of birth. A change came when he entered
i'l Saturn Oasa. i.e. he was completely disowned by his parents and he
had to work and earn his own livelihood. During these 19 years of
5atum Dasa, he had been learning and earning and the life was quite
regular and smooth though progress was very slow. With the change
of Mercury Oasa. a complete change came in his life. From employment,
he came to the business. but this period was full of struggles, sufferings
and fluctuations, though every suffering brought an additional knowledge
to him.
With Ketu Dasa. his life was completely changed. As said earlier.
this Oasa period was Karmic. Ketu is placed on the asterism of Venus
and it became all the more important because Venus is one of the
Karmic Conuolling Planets. With the beginning of Ketu oasa, he started
